2.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
2.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

3.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
3.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

4.title: Forever 80s
4.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

5.title: 40 Modern Girls Of The 1980s!
5.description: Check out all of the greatest hits from the girls that made their mark in the '80s!

6.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1984!
6.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1984!

7.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
7.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

8.title: ... So 80s!
8.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
